cards.name: δ Rainbow Energy
cards.text: δ Rainbow Energy provides Colorless Energy. While attached to a Pokémon that has δ on its card, δ Rainbow Energy provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

tests.name: delta_rainbow_colorless_normally
tests.description: Test that δ Rainbow Energy provides Colorless normally

tests.name: delta_rainbow_all_types_for_delta
tests.description: Test that δ Rainbow Energy provides all types for δ Pokemon
